titleStmt.title: SII 20.380: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 380. (B.K. No. 44 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Right pillar at the eastern entrance into the Sōmēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1354, Virōdhikṛit, Māgha, ba. 30, Monday, Solar eclipse. The details are a little irregular. They correspond to A.D. 1432, February 2. But the week-day was Saturday and the Śaka year current when there was a solar eclipse on that day.
The inscription records a gift of toll-income to the temple of Sōmanātha of Purikara-nagara, by Aḷiya Viṭharasa at the instance of Ārādhyadēva of ubhayamārga.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī sōmanāthāya [namaḥ .] śrī gaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . nirvvighṇamastu namastuṁga
siraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhaṁ mūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . jalaruhapariUratadharaṇīvaḷeyavadhūkāṁte kuṁtaḷaṁ ṟa
dīya kuṁtaḷamāgesadudu sale dakṣiṇavāraṇāsi pulikaranagaraṁ . svasti śrīRead tadīya.
jayādbhudaya ṣakavaruṣa 1354 virōdhikrutu saṁvatsarada māgha ba 30 sōma
vāra sūriyōparāga pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu sōmanāthadēvara naivēdyakke biṭṭadu
śrīmatu Ubhayamūrggada Ārādhyadēvagaḷa Āgneyiṁ Aḷiya viṭharasaru saṁ
thegaṁṭaḷeya hēṟu Eṁṭṭu dinakke kaḷasāpurakke hōha Āḍakeya hēṟu yera
ḍanu sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi biṭṭarū . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭhirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
da napālanayōrmmadhyē dānātsrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsarggamavāpnōtiRead dā .
pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . Akṣayasukhaddī dharmmava rakṣisi sikṣisida pu(ṁ)ṇyapu
risargga(ṁ)kkuṁ bhakṣisidātana saṁtānakṣaya Āukṣeyaṁ kulakṣeya
makkuṁ . śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 20.380 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
